languages.text: "Лорд-капитан!" {n}Янур бросает резьбу, вытягивается по струнке и складывает руки аквилой.{/n}
"Lord Captain!" {n}Janur drops his carving, stands up straight, and makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан!" {n}Янур бросает резьбу, вытягивается по струнке и складывает руки аквилой.{/n}

languages.text: 「船長様！」{n}ジャヌールは彫刻を落として立ち上がり、アキラの印をする。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain!" {n}Janur drops his carving, stands up straight, and makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n}

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan!" {n}Janur; elindeki oymayı bırakıyor, dik duruyor ve Çift Başlı Kartal işareti yapıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain!" {n}Janur drops his carving, stands up straight, and makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan!" {n}Janur; elindeki oymayı bırakıyor, dik duruyor ve Çift Başlı Kartal işareti yapıyor.{/n}

languages.text: “舰长大人！”{n}雅努尔扔下雕刻，站直身子，做了个双头鹰手势。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain!" {n}Janur drops his carving, stands up straight, and makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人！”{n}雅努尔扔下雕刻，站直身子，做了个双头鹰手势。{/n}

languages.text: "Lord Captain!" {n}Janur lässt seine Schnitzerei fallen, steht stramm und macht das Zeichen des Adlers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain!" {n}Janur lässt seine Schnitzerei fallen, steht stramm und macht das Zeichen des Adlers.{/n}

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine} ! » {n}Janur lâche sa sculpture et se redresse brusquement en faisant le signe de l'Aquila.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain!" {n}Janur drops his carving, stands up straight, and makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine} ! » {n}Janur lâche sa sculpture et se redresse brusquement en faisant le signe de l'Aquila.{/n}

languages.text: «¡Lord Capitán!» {n}Janur suelta la talla, se pone firme y hace el signo del Aquila.{/n}
